C

CELL_STATE_CLASSES - Static variable in class com.example.miniproyecto2.controller.GameController
CSS style classes used to represent different cell states.
changeScene(String) - Method in class com.example.miniproyecto2.view.GameStage
Changes the current scene displayed in the stage to load the specified FXML file.
checkInput(char) - Method in class com.example.miniproyecto2.controller.GameController
Checks if the given character is a valid Sudoku input (1â€“6).
checkInput(int, int, int) - Method in class com.example.miniproyecto2.model.AbstractSudoku
Validates whether a number can be placed at the given coordinates.
checkInput(int, int, int) - Method in interface com.example.miniproyecto2.model.ISudoku
 
checkOriginalNum(int, int) - Method in class com.example.miniproyecto2.model.AbstractSudoku
Checks if the cell at the given coordinates is part of the original puzzle.
checkOriginalNum(int, int) - Method in interface com.example.miniproyecto2.model.ISudoku
 
clearCellStateClasses(Button) - Method in class com.example.miniproyecto2.controller.GameController
Removes all state-related CSS classes from a button.
com.example.miniproyecto2 - module com.example.miniproyecto2
Java Platform Module System descriptor for the MiniProyecto2 Sudoku application.
